items.title: Will Goldman Sachs (GS) Partnership With Elevation Point Redefine Its Competitive Edge in Wealth Management?
items.description: Elevation Point recently announced a strategic collaboration with Goldman Sachs, expanding access for partner firms to Goldman Sachs' banking, lending, trading, asset management, and capital markets services. This partnership broadens Elevation Point's advisory platform by further integrating Goldman Sachs’ custody and capital markets solutions, targeting independent advisors and clients with complex wealth management needs. We'll explore how Goldman Sachs’ expanded service offerings to...
